description: From the manufacturer Everbuild – A Sika Company The UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
